eval_dimensions.name: Draft vs Submit Gate
eval_dimensions.description: Step 8a uses AskUserQuestion to present Draft/Comment/Request-Changes/Approve options. Never auto-submits without user confirmation. Default biases to Draft when draft-intent phrases are in the invocation, and when reviewer is the PR author.

eval_dimensions.name: Courtesy-Fixup Scope Gate
eval_dimensions.description: Step 6b uses AskUserQuestion when courtesy_fixes is non-empty (ALWAYS_ASK). Skipped entirely when the list is empty. Never auto-applies fixups.

eval_dimensions.name: No Auto-Submit
eval_dimensions.description: Review is never posted without user confirming the submission mode at Step 8a. Transport B (bot comment) bypasses 8a and posts directly — this is the documented exception.

eval_dimensions.name: Skill Delegation
eval_dimensions.description: Courtesy fixes are applied via Skill(Dev10x:gh-pr-fixup), never via inline shell commands. Spec compliance check delegates to the spec-reviewer agent.

eval_dimensions.name: Task Orchestration
eval_dimensions.description: Six TaskCreate calls fire at startup in dependency order before any review work begins.

evals.name: Draft vs submit gate uses AskUserQuestion
evals.description: Open PR with normal diff. Step 8a must use AskUserQuestion with 4 options: Draft, Comment, Request Changes, Approve. Plain-text question is forbidden.

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called at Step 8a draft-vs-submit decision point
Draft (PENDING) option is presented to the user
Submit as COMMENT option is presented to the user
Review payload is NOT posted before AskUserQuestion gate fires

evals.name: Draft-intent phrase biases default to Draft
evals.description: Invocation contains 'leave as draft'. Step 8a default selection must be Draft (PENDING), not Submit as COMMENT.

assertions.signal: Draft (PENDING) is the default option when draft-intent phrase detected
AskUserQuestion still fires — draft-intent is a default bias, not an auto-selection

evals.name: Courtesy-fixup scope gate fires when fixes are classified
evals.description: Step 5b classifies one mechanical finding as courtesy-fixable. Step 6b must call AskUserQuestion before applying any fix.

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called at Step 6b courtesy-fixup scope gate
Skill(Dev10x:gh-pr-fixup) is NOT called before AskUserQuestion gate fires
Skill(Dev10x:gh-pr-fixup) is called only after user approves at the gate

evals.name: Courtesy-fixup gate is skipped when list is empty
evals.description: All findings are author-fix candidates (none are mechanical unambiguous fixes). Step 6b must be skipped entirely — no AskUserQuestion for courtesy fixes.

assertions.signal: No AskUserQuestion for courtesy-fixup scope when courtesy_fixes list is empty

evals.name: Six phase tasks created before any review work
evals.description: Skill must create 6 TaskCreate entries at startup before fetching the diff.

assertions.signal: TaskCreate is called 6 times at startup for each orchestration phase
Fetch PR diff task created at startup

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should/should-not trigger the gh-pr-review skill

should_trigger.query: review PR #42 and post your findings
should_trigger.rationale: Explicit intent to review and post to GitHub

should_trigger.query: can you review this PR and leave inline comments? https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42
should_trigger.rationale: Review request with GitHub posting intent

should_not_trigger.query: review my own branch changes before I create a PR
should_not_trigger.rationale: Self-review before PR creation — use Dev10x:review instead

should_not_trigger.query: respond to the review comments on my PR
should_not_trigger.rationale: Responding to existing comments — use Dev10x:gh-pr-respond
